name: ShopBack
description:
ShopBack (www.shopback.sg) is Southeast Asia’s #1 online shopping cashback site. Unbelievably, we actually pay our customers cold-hard-cash when they shop at their favorite online stores through us! Till date, ShopBack already features >500 of the region’s most well-loved online shopping destinations, paying out cold-hard-cash to hundreds of thousands of delighted customers across Singapore, Malaysia, Indonesia, Philippines and even India.

But what ShopBack really wants to be is Asia’s #1 destination for making the perfect online shopping decision. We will achieve this by constantly pushing the limits of engineering to build a scalable consumer-centric shopping platform using cutting-edge technologies and data-driven analytics. We seek highly-driven and highly-skilled engineers to join our ace team.

What We Provide

· Unparalleled startup experience - build from the ground up and work together with an experienced team.

· World-class team - our employees go through an extremely rigorous interview process. Work only amongst the best talents in the industry

· Intriguing new products, integrated across industry verticals

· Hard, rewarding work balanced with loads of fun (take on the ShopBack Wii Challenge or compete in our ping-pong championships if you think you have what it takes!)
